message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Request consensus for doc update commit">
I've staged the doc update to mark Step 7 (Clarify as Project) as complete and move the NEXT marker to Step 8 (Waiting For) in docs/gtd-product-discovery.md. This is a straightforward progress marker update. 

Can I get a quick 9/9 consensus to commit and push this doc change? Reply with your approval or concerns.
</teammate-message>

content.text: A straightforward progress marker update — marking Step 7 complete and moving NEXT to Step 8. This is exactly right from a product perspective. We completed Clarify as Project, and Waiting For is the next step in the implementation order.

input.content: +1 from Marty. Doc update matches our implementation progress — Step 7 is done, Step 8 is next. No concerns.
input.summary: Consensus approval for doc update commit

routing.summary: Consensus approval for doc update commit
